                   }

+                @Reusable
+                @Component
+                struct SendMessageItem {
+                  @State mmsItem: mmsListType = {} as mmsListType
+                  @State index: number = 0
+                  @State contactsNum: number = 0
+                  @State needRefreshTime: boolean = false
+                  @State currentScreenWidth: number = 0
+                  @State isTouch: boolean = false

+                  onChangeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool: () => void = () => {}
+                  onChangeFocusAble: () => void = () => {}

+
+                  aboutToReuse(params: Record<string, ESObject>) {
+                    this.mmsItem = params.mmsItem
+                    this.index = params.index
+                    this.contactsNum = params.contactsNum
+                    this.needRefreshTime = params.needRefreshTime
+                    this.currentScreenWidth = params.currentScreenWidth
+                    this.isTouch = params.isTouch
+                    this.isSendingAnimate = params.isSendingAnimate
+                    this.isScrolling = params.isScrolling
+                    this.scrollEndIndex = params.scrollEndIndex
+                    this.scrollStartIndex = params.scrollStartIndex
+                    this.isPermissionDenied = params.isPermissionDenied
+                    this.textDirection = params.textDirection
+                    this.isSelectStatus = params.isSelectStatus
+                    this.isOsAccountConstraintEnabled = params.isOsAccountConstraintEnabled
+                    this.smsType = params.smsType
+                    this.mmsListLength = params.mmsListLength
+                    this.detailTime = params.detailTime
+                    this.sendStatus = params.sendStatus
+                    this.failuresNumber = params.failuresNumber
+                    this.completeNumber = params.completeNumber
+                    this.isMsm = params.isMsm
+                    this.isRcs = params.isRcs
+                    this.rcsType = params.rcsType
+                    this.msgTitle = params.msgTitle
+                    this.content = params.content
+                    this.contentType = params.contentType
+                    this.msgShowType = params.msgShowType
+                    this.detectResContent = params.detectResContent
+                    this.mmsSource = params.mmsSource
+                    this.id = params.id
+                    this.isCbChecked = params.isCbChecked
+                    this.isDraft = params.isDraft

+                    this.onSendFailedButtonClick = params.onSendFailedButtonClick
+                    this.onBubbleClick = params.onBubbleClick

+                    this.onListCheckBoxChange = params.onListCheckBoxChange
+                    this.onChangeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool = params.onChangeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool
+                    this.onChangeFocusAble = params.onChangeFocusAble
+                    this.onPushToGroupDetail = params.onPushToGroupDetail
+                    this.canResendMms = params.canResendMms
+                    this.setResendIndex = params.setResendIndex
+                    this.reportEvent = params.reportEvent
+                  }
+
+                  build() {
+                    Column() {
+                      // <!--Sending failed icon-->
+                      if (this.sendStatus == commonData.int.RCS_SEND_CANCELED ||
+                        (this.contactsNum == 1 &&
+                          this.sendStatus == commonData.int.SEND_MESSAGE_FAILED) ||
+                        (this.contactsNum > 1 &&
+                          this.failuresNumber > 0 &&

+                        SendFailedButton({

+                          contactsNum: this.contactsNum,
+                          onSendFailedButtonClick: this.onSendFailedButtonClick

+                      }

+                            contentType: this.contentType,
+                            bubbleTextDirection: 'right',
+                            itemIndex: this.index,
+                            delConversionController: this.delConversionController,
+                            showMMContentPicker: this.isTouch,
+                            content: this.content,
+                            mmsItem: this.mmsItem,
+                            scrollEndIndex: this.scrollEndIndex,
+                            scrollStartIndex: this.scrollStartIndex,
+                            changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool: this.onChangeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool,
+                            mmsContentBackgroundColor: $r('app.color.brand'),
+                          }).id('mms_content_right_id')
+                        }
+                        if (!this.isMsm || (this.msgTitle && this.content == '') ||
+                            (this.isMsm &&
+                              this.content !== '' &&
+                              this.msgShowType !== common.MESSAGE_SHOW_TYPE.MAP &&
+                              !MmsUtil.isSlideType(this.contentType))) {
+                          BubbleText({

+                            bubbleTextBorderRadius: [2, 16],
+                            bubbleTextDirection: 'right',
+                            content: this.content,
+                            detectResContent: this.detectResContent,
+                            isRcs: this.isRcs,
+                            bubbleTextBackgroundColor: $r('app.color.brand'),
+                            itemIndex: this.index,
+                            mmsItem: this.mmsItem,
+                            delConversionController: this.delConversionController,
+                            showMMContentPicker: this.isTouch,
+                            currentScreenWidth: this.currentScreenWidth,
+                            isMsm: this.isMsm,

+                            isGeometryAnimate: this.isSendingAnimate,
+                            scrollEndIndex: this.scrollEndIndex,
+                            scrollStartIndex: this.scrollStartIndex,
+                            isLastItem: this.index == this.mmsListLength - 1,
+                            changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool: this.onChangeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool,
+                            smsType: this.smsType,
+                            changeFocusAble: this.onChangeFocusAble

+                      .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.End)
+                      .onClick(this.onBubbleClick)
+                    }
+                    .justifyContent(FlexAlign.End)
+                    .alignItems(VerticalAlign.Center)
+                  }
+                }

+                          .fontSize(10)
+                          .lineHeight(13)

+                        Text(this.needRefreshTime ? this.detailTime : this.detailTime)
+                          .textAlign(TextAlign.Start)
+                          .lineHeight(13)
+                          .fontSize(10)

+                    }

+                }
